L. 97–31, § 12(97)(A)95 Stat. 162lAug. 14, 1958June 12, 1960May 27, 1961Sept. 21, 1961Oct. 21, 1970Aug. 6, 1981Subsection (a) is added for clarity because various provisions of the source language for this chapter imply that the Secretary is to prescribe regulations individually (except for regulations affecting a determination of tax liability). See, e.g., 46 App. U.S.C. 1177(a) (last sentence), (f)(1) (last sentence), and () (last sentence).lIn subsection (b), the words “not inconsistent with the foregoing provisions of this section, as may be necessary or appropriate” are omitted as surplus.

See, e.g., 46 App. U.S.C. 1177(a) (last sentence), (f)(1) (last sentence), and () (last sentence).lIn subsection (b), the words “not inconsistent with the foregoing provisions of this section, as may be necessary or appropriate” are omitted as surplus.

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (b), the Secretary shall prescribe regulations to carry out this chapter.

children.heading: .—Tax Liability
children.label: b .—Tax Liability
children.text: The Secretary and the Secretary of the Treasury shall prescribe joint regulations for the determination of tax liability under this chapter.
